title: Operationalize machine learning models (MLOps)
summary: Learn the full MLOps lifecycle for machine learning models, from experimentation and pipeline automation to CI/CD, automated testing, and model deployment in production.

sections.title: Operationalize machine learning models (MLOps)
sections.summary: Learn the full MLOps lifecycle for machine learning models, from experimentation and pipeline automation to CI/CD, automated testing, and model deployment in production.

lessons.title: Experiment with Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to find the best machine learning model with automated machine learning (AutoML), MLflow-tracked notebooks, and the Responsible AI dashboard.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/experiment-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Perform hyperparameter tuning with Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to perform hyperparameter tuning with a sweep job in Azure Machine Learning.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/perform-hyperparameter-tuning-azure-machine-learning-pipelines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Perform hyperparameter tuning with Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Run pipelines in Azure Machine Learning
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create and use components to build pipeline in Azure Machine Learning. Run and schedule Azure Machine Learning pipelines to automate machine learning workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/run-pipelines-azure-machine-learning/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Run pipelines in Azure Machine Learning

lessons.title: Trigger Azure Machine Learning jobs with GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
MLOps, machine learning operations

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/trigger-azure-machine-learn-jobs-github-actions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Trigger Azure Machine Learning jobs with GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Trigger GitHub Actions with feature-based development
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to trigger GitHub Actions with feature-based development to achieve machine learning operations or MLOps.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/trigger-github-actions-trunk-based-development/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Trigger GitHub Actions with feature-based development

lessons.title: Work with environments in GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
machine learning operations, MLOps, environments

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/work-environments-github-actions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Work with environments in GitHub Actions

lessons.title: Deploy a model with GitHub Actions
lessons.content_md:
machine learning operations, MLOps, model deployment, online endpoint

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/deploy-model-github-actions/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a model with GitHub Actions

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Operationalize machine learning models (MLOps)
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Operationalize machine learning models (MLOps)**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
